# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  vpcNetwork:
    type: google_compute_network
    properties:
      name: my-vpc-network

  appSubnet:
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      name: app-subnet
      ipCidrRange: auto
      network: $(ref.vpcNetwork.selfLink)
      region: us-central1

  dbSubnet:
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      name: db-subnet
      ipCidrRange: auto
      network: $(ref.vpcNetwork.selfLink)
      region: us-central1

  webSubnet:
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      name: web-subnet
      ipCidrRange: auto
      network: $(ref.vpcNetwork.selfLink)
      region: us-central1
